SCH.u: Applied Intro + Physical & Data Link Layer

GS.t: Week 1 — OS Already Done + ADA PYQs. OS: Full PYQ set 2014-2024 (scheduling + memory + deadlock numericals). ADA: Remaining PYQ sets for all chapters.
Week 1 — COA + C Programming PYQs. COA: All pipeline/cache numericals from 2014-2024. C Programming: pointer + recursion trace questions.
Week 1 — DSA Deep Revision. DSA: Trees (AVL/Heap/BST), Graph algorithms, DP patterns, Sorting complexities. Full PYQ drill.
Week 1 — TOC + CD PYQs. TOC: DFA construction, Pumping lemma, Decidability. CD: FIRST/FOLLOW, LL(1), SLR(1) tables. All GATE PYQs.
Week 2 — Digital Logic + Math. DL: K-map, flip-flop, counters PYQs. Math: Linear Algebra + Probability deep PYQ drill.
Week 2 — DBMS + CN PYQs. DBMS: SQL joins + normalisation + concurrency. CN: Subnetting + TCP/UDP + OSI layer questions.
Week 2 — Mock Test #1 (Full Syllabus, 3 hrs). 65-question full mock under timed conditions. Review every wrong answer.
Week 3 — Error Log Review: Math + COA. Fix weaknesses from Mock #1. Redo wrong COA/Math PYQs.
Week 3 — Error Log Review: DSA + OS. Redo all wrong DSA + OS PYQs. Reinforce scheduling traces and DP tables.
Week 3 — Error Log Review: TOC + DBMS. Fix all wrong TOC automaton and DBMS normalisation answers.
Week 3 — Mock Test #2 + GA Full Practice. Full mock test #2. GA: 10-year PYQ set timed (12 min). Log all errors.
Week 4 — Mixed PYQ Sprint: All Subjects. Shuffle all subjects. 50 PYQs picked randomly from 2019-2024 GATE papers.
Week 4 — Mock Test #3. 65-question full mock. Compare with Mock #1 & #2. Track improvement.
Week 4 — Mock #3 Error Log Review. Resolve incorrect questions and record mistakes.
Week 4 — PYQ Sprint: GATE 2023 CS Paper (3h timed).
Week 4 — Weak Areas: Advanced Pipelining & Cache Mapping.
Week 4 — Weak Areas: Discrete Math Logic, Set Theory & Graphs.
Week 4 — PYQ Sprint: GATE 2022 CS Paper (3h timed).
Week 4 — Weak Areas: Dynamic Programming & Greedy Algorithms.
Week 4 — Weak Areas: Compiler syntax analysis & parsing tables.
Week 4 — PYQ Sprint: GATE 2021 CS Paper (3h timed).
Week 4 — Consolidated formula cards & short notes compilation.
Week 4 — Month-end self-assessment and weak topics revision planning.
Oct Week 1 — Weakest Subject Deep Dive. Pick worst-performing subject from Sep mocks. Redo ALL PYQs.
Oct Week 1 — Mock Test #4. Full 3-hour mock. Focus on speed + accuracy.
Oct Week 1 — Theory Gaps: COA + DL. Revisit any COA pipeline/cache or DL flip-flop/counter concept still unclear.
Oct Week 1 — GA Weekly Mock. 10-year GA PYQ set timed. Verbal + Quant + Analytical.
Oct Week 2 — TOC + CD Speed Round. 50 TOC + 20 CD PYQs timed. Build automata construction speed.
Oct Week 2 — Mock Test #5. Full 3-hour mock.
Oct Week 2 — DBMS + CN Sprint. All DBMS SQL + concurrency PYQs. All CN subnetting + TCP PYQs.
Oct Week 2 — OS Deep Dive (already done). OS: scheduling algorithms comparison + Banker's algorithm + page replacement.
Oct Week 3 — Mock Test #6. Full 3-hour mock. Track score trend from Mock #1-6.
Oct Week 3 — Error Patterns Analysis. Compile all 6 mock error logs. Find top 3 mistake patterns. Drill those concepts.
Oct Week 3 — Math + DSA Numericals. All numerical PYQs: Linear Algebra, Probability, Sorting complexity, Graph algorithms.
Oct Week 3 — Mock Test #7. Full 3-hour mock.
Oct Week 4 — Formula Sheet + Anki Sprint. Review all GATE formula flashcards. Spot any remaining gaps.
Oct Week 4 — Mock Test #8. Full 3-hour mock. Target: 70+/100.
Oct Week 4 — All PYQ 2020-2024 Review. Go through full 2020, 2021, 2022, 2023, 2024 GATE CS papers. All questions.
Oct Week 4 — Revision Complete Checkpoint. Score check: if Mock avg is 65+, maintain pace. If below, identify gaps.
Weak subject revision: Re-solve all PYQs of weakest subject.
🎯 MOCK TEST #9 — Full 65Q. Target: 72+.
Mock #9 analysis. Compare with Mock 8.
Fix Mock #9 mistakes. Log questions in error book.
OS: Disk scheduling. COA: Interrupt latency calculations.
Rest day. Check progress against syllabus.

Fix Mock #10 mistakes. Re-study weak topics.

Review notes. Physical rest.

Fix Mock #12 errors.
PYQ Sprint: Solve GATE 2016 CS paper.
DBMS: Concurrency serializability. CN: Routing algorithms.

Mock #13 analysis.
Fix Mock #13 errors.
PYQ Sprint: Solve GATE 2015 CS paper.

Formula cards writing. Plan December.
Speed test: 60 random numericals in 120 min.
Month assessment: Identify weak subjects.
Revise weak areas from Mocks 1-13.

Fix Mock #14 mistakes.
Revise OS page replacement + COA pipeline stalls.
Rest day. Re-verify formula cards.

Rest day. Check error book.
Revise DBMS normalization + CN subnetting.
